title: Dreaming of Mirror Breaking
description: Dreaming of a mirror breaking often signifies a change within or a disruption in one's self-perception.

meanings.title: Main Interpretation
meanings.description: According to Freud, the breaking of a mirror symbolizes a fracture or shift in an individual's self-perception. Jung might interpret this as a sign of inner exploration or reevaluation of identity.

meanings.title: Subconscious Warning
meanings.description: Your subconscious might be urging you to reassess or change your perception of yourself in a more realistic way.

meanings.title: Life Context
meanings.description: This dream might occur during times of identity or role conflicts, especially in professional or personal life.

interpretation: Dreaming of a mirror breaking may indicate that it is time to gain a new perspective on your past or self-perception.

context.positive: Confronting your inner self might lead to a stronger sense of identity.
context.negative: This could lead to feelings of insecurity or identity crisis.
